name: Shofo
long_description: We're building the world's largest index of videos by combining two sources: public video collected and cleaned from the open web, and private video aggregated from hundreds of smaller companies that can't sell directly to labs. Both feed into a single, continuously updating index of billions of videos that we clean, segment, and label to build custom datasets for AI teams. For example, if a lab needs 50K cooking videos featuring hand-object interactions, we query our index, extract the matching subset, and deliver a clean, structured dataset in days.
